candidate_evaluation.expected_architecture_position: immediate successor if and only if proof-loop corpus is sufficient
reasons: No canonical RED->RESET->GREEN chain exists for the accepted Track A lineage.
Rollback evidence is not tied to an accepted merged proof-loop output.
Skipping ledger/signing/custody would leave the proof corpus un-packaged.
Architecture requires packaged ledger/signing/custody outputs before exit handoff.
Residual classification has not been materialized after proof packaging.
Purgatorium has not produced a sufficient exit handoff package.
Infernus Revalidation admission cannot precede packaged Purgatorium evidence.

candidate_evaluation.expected_architecture_position: fallback when real corpus is insufficient or ambiguous
reasons: Current corpus is insufficient to open PURG05 without inventing proof-loop evidence.
Keeping next_phase=null is required by the anti-loop rule when no successor can be materialized in the same cycle.
